channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Portugal vs DR Congo: Portugal by 1 (60%)
item.description: Group K, 2026-06-17, Houston. Portugal 60% / draw 25% / DR Congo 15%. Predicted margin 1.
